subject: Two study protocols for PSQ agent: DA moderator hypothesis + Dignity Phase A Pass 2

body.summary: Session 85 produced a processual reinterpretation of PSQ dimensions grounded in neutral process monism. Two study protocols derive from this. Both use existing data.

protocols.name: DA Moderator Hypothesis Test
protocols.phases: 3: factor comparison, moderation analysis, qualitative validation

protocols.name: Dignity Index Phase A Pass 2
protocols.method: Fresh session, Cohen kappa + PABAK + ICC(2,1)

claims.claim: Processual reinterpretation does not invalidate existing findings
claims.basis: Adds ontological depth, not contradictory results

action_gate.gate_condition: PSQ agent reviews and executes DA Phase 1

epistemic_flags: DA hypothesis derives from theory, not empirical anomaly
DI Pass 2 = LLM session stability, not human agreement
